description:
Configure Wazuh with a new CDB list and a corresponding detection rule, ensuring the manager is restarted to apply changes. Create the list 'threat-intel-blocklist' at etc/lists/threat-intel-blocklist with the following entries:
45.33.32.156:network_scanner
185.220.101.34:tor_exit_node
91.189.114.8:brute_force_attacker
104.248.36.228:malware_distributor
45.148.10.78:botnet_c2
185.56.80.65:apt_infrastructure
23.129.64.130:tor_exit_node
171.25.193.20:tor_exit_node

Implement a custom detection rule (ID 100100) with level 12 in the syslog group. The rule should perform an 'address_match' lookup on the 'srcip' field against the 'etc/lists/threat-intel-blocklist' list. Ensure the rule description includes 'threat intelligence' and the group includes 'threat_intelligence'.
